messages.content: Translate the following English sentence to Chinese: The weather is nice today.
Write a short poem about spring.

Spring breeze gently blows,
Flowers bloom in vibrant rows,
Nature's beauty shows.
Explain what photosynthesis is in one sentence.
Photosynthesis is the process by which green plants convert sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide into glucose and oxygen.
Classify the sentiment of the following review: I absolutely love this product! It exceeded all my expectations.
Classify the sentiment of the following review: The service was terrible and the food was cold.
Classify the sentiment of the following review: It was okay, nothing special but not bad either.
Rate the quality of this text on a scale from 0 to 1: The mitochondria is the powerhouse of the cell, converting nutrients into ATP through oxidative phosphorylation.
Rate the quality of this text on a scale from 0 to 1: me go store buy thing good yes.
Rate the quality of this text on a scale from 0 to 1: The report provides a reasonable overview but lacks detailed analysis.
Summarize the key idea: Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn from data.
ML lets systems learn from data automatically.
